calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trevor A. Caudel, Esq., Telephone 415-260-0947, appearing for Plaintiff; (CourtCall)
Ivo Labar, Esq., Telephone 415-262-3822, appearing for Defendant Two A&H Entertainment LLC;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BLODGETT, INC.'s MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT And Hearing For Right To Attach. Order.

Plaintiff's Blodgett, Inc.'s application for a right to attach order and a writ of attachment is denied. Plaintiff has failed to carry its burden of showing the probable validity of its claim and an ascertainable amount. (See Code Civ. Proc. 484.090(a)(2); Goldstein v Barak Construction (2008) 164 Cal.App.4th 845, 852.) Although the Janitorial Services Agreement provided that if payment were not timely received, a ten percent late fee "will be added to the following month's invoice," most of the invoices did not seek such fees, which supports defendant's assertion that plaintiff agreed to waive the late fee. (See Gamboa and Snyder Decs.) The recent invoices that seek only $3,350/month also support defendant's assertion that the parties entered into a new oral agreement.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
